scan_result: 1 genuinely new verified free/open-source template added

templates.name: Spree Storefront
templates.license_status: MIT verified from repository LICENSE file
templates.reuse_policy: compatible-code; code may be used, modified, distributed, sublicensed, and sold provided the copyright and MIT permission notice are retained
templates.access_status: public repository, no login required, no trial, no marketplace gate
templates.skill_usage_notes: Use as a concrete production-grade ecommerce UI reference for product grids, product detail pages, responsive carts, checkout flows, account/order screens, regional selectors, policy pages, SEO metadata, and server-first Next.js storefront architecture. Keep Spree-specific API integration optional when adapting only the frontend patterns.
templates.meaningful_update_reason: Official Spree production storefront introduced in 2026 with Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, multi-region routing, one-page checkout, account management, payment flows, transactional email UI, and verified MIT licensing.

verification.repository_readme: README states production-ready headless ecommerce storefront, Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, open source MIT, and free to fork/customize.
